name: Example PC
tags: amateur historian of late-20th-century computer science
backstory:
An example PC template. Replace this freeform field with your character's actual story.

*What in their life taught them to hold an intention against pressure?* The example PC's father was an autodidact who insisted that you should be able to defend any belief you held against a thoughtful adult. Family dinners were Socratic dialogues, sometimes brutal. They learned to test a thought against doubt before committing to it — and once committed, to stay committed even when others changed the subject.
